title: australina pusilla subsp. muelleri
intro: Australina pusilla subsp. muelleri, also known as the Dwarf Mulla Mulla, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing. Australina pusilla subsp. muelleri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits, however, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
